HGSS.551.0009:
A guy named Bill made the Pokémon
PC storage system.\f
You can access the Pokémon storage
system using the PC at the reception\r
there. Why don’t you try it once?
HGSS.551.0010:
It was about three years ago.
This group of thugs called Team Rocket\r
was involved in wrongdoing. They were\r
abusing Pokémon.\f
But!
Bad things never last!\f
A boy did a wonderful job and
Team Rocket was disbanded!
HGSS.551.0011:
Pokémon are really smart.
Traded Pokémon might not listen to you\r
right away. For example, high-level\r
Pokémon sometimes refuse to obey\r
when you don’t have enough Gym Badges.
HGSS.551.0012:
Primo: Hello!
I should be a familiar face to every\r
Pokémon fan. I’m from the TV show,\r
“The Show Me Show!”\f
I am Primo, the big brother!\f
Today, would you, one of my fans,
tell me what you think of me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.551.0013:
Primo: Oh my...!
Is that how you feel about me?!\f
I never thought of it that way before.
By the way, how do you like the\r
way I am so exciting and fun?\f
HGSS.551.0014:
Primo: Truly?\f
That gives me all-new energy so
I can work even harder!\f
Great feedback! It’ll help me a lot.
Thank you for your continued support!
HGSS.551.0015:
You cannot possibly mean that you are
not interested in the big brother...?\f
Arrgh, that cannot be true!
You are just busy right now,\r
aren’t you? That must be it!\f
Why don’t you answer my questions
when you’ve got time for me?\f
See you!
HGSS.551.0016:
Primo: ...!\f
You are no ordinary fan, knowing such
a thing!\f
You’re a Trainer, right?
I’ll pull some strings for you.\f
I think I can swing a deal to get you
a new wallpaper for your PC Boxes.\f
Make sure you keep your channel
tuned to “The Show Me Show!”\f
And don’t forget about me, the
big brother!
HGSS.551.0017:
Primo: ...!\f
You are no ordinary fan, knowing such
a thing!\f
You are a Trainer, right?
I’ll pull some strings for you.\f
I think I can swing a deal so you
can receive a Mystery Gift.\f
Make sure you keep your channel
tuned to “The Show Me Show!”\f
And don’t forget about me, the
big brother!
HGSS.551.0018:
Primo: ...!\f
You are no ordinary fan, knowing such
a thing!\f
You are a Trainer, right?
I’ll pull some strings for you.\f
I think I can swing a deal and
give you this Egg.\r
You take good care of it!\f
HGSS.551.0020:
Primo: ...!\f
You are no ordinary fan, knowing such
a thing!\f
You are a Trainer, right?
I’ll pull some strings for you.\f
I think I can swing a deal and
give you this Egg.\r
You take good care of it!\f
...\f
Your party is full, and I can’t
give it to you!
HGSS.551.0021:
Hmm...\f
Can you tell me what kind of Trainer
you like best?\f
HGSS.551.0022:
Which kind of Trainer would you like
to be? [0200,0000]
HGSS.551.0023:
[010E,0000,0000] is the kind of Trainer
you want to be? [0200,0000]
HGSS.551.0024:
I see! So [010E,0000,0000] is the kind
of Trainer you like.\f
If that’s the case, others may
come to see you in the same way.\f
HGSS.551.0025:
Talk to me again if you want to
let me know what kind of Trainer\r
you like best.
HGSS.551.0026:
Hello! You’ve been mistaken for
[010E,0000,0000], haven’t you?\f
But I think you can also pass for
a different kind of Trainer.\f
So, how about telling me what kind of
Trainer you like?\f
